evidence: "Nice Christmas fare. Appropriately sentimental story for those who like to believe in Devine intervention."
"The lengths we as humans will go to in dealing with abandonment and consequent loss of identity is examined with tenderness and understanding."
"It is difficult to judge if the actors could really act. Trying to maintain suspense by shifting suspicion from one character to another didn't work."
"One always knows from the outset who the killer is, so it removes the series from the detective genre which is what I was expecting."
"It's slow moving, and the intrigue is contrived."
"Country wisdom.. . .very predictable, but entertaining. Not very challenging themes, but certainly wholesome."
"The whole production was well done from authentic basis for the story to performances to costuming and set."
"It is so refreshing to watch a series that truly entertains."
"Nice photography. Would have appreciated more about his individual works and techniques."
"Actors chosen to postural the real life characters even had some physical resemblance to the real people."
"Beautiful acting by the principals the two children."
"It was a difficult story to watch, but one that reminds of our duty to present military personnel."

summary: The user enjoys drama and romance with a preference for slower-paced narratives that emphasize emotional depth and production quality. They appreciate well-crafted stories but are critical of overly simplistic or predictable plots.
